allow: Bash(python -c "from meditation_mixer import tts; [print\(v.voice_id, '|', v.label\) for v in tts.list_voices\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "from meditation_mixer import tts; [print\(v.voice_id, '|', v.label\) for v in tts.list_voices\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('meditation_mixer/tts.py'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('meditation_mixer/mixer.py'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('app.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('All three files parse OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\) for f in ['meditation_mixer/tts.py','meditation_mixer/mixer.py','meditation_mixer/mastering.py','meditation_mixer/config.py','app.py']]; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(git commit -m 'docs: add meditation mixing pipeline specification *)
Bash(git commit -m 'chore: add .claude directory to gitignore *)
